new_fixes_this_run.description: Boost +8pts for ETH in TRENDING regime. 71% WR, +$9.49/trade EV on 7 live trades. Strongest cross-regime edge after BTC_TRENDING (80% WR, n=5). 20% A/B gate.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: Increases ETH confidence in best-performing regime configuration. Expected: improved ETH signal quality in trend conditions.

new_fixes_this_run.description: Trending regime min hold time increased from 2.0h to 3.0h. Created hold_time_rules_state.json (did not exist). Forensics evidence: wins exit at 3.3h median, losses at 1.5h median. Noise stops fire at 1.5h before directional moves materialize at 3.3h.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: Blocks premature exits in trending regime (noise at <1.5h vs signal at >3h). Expected: fewer stopped-out trending winners.

resolved_this_run.reason: btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 has confidence_max=80.0. graduated_rules.py line 74: rule rejects when signal confidence > confidence_max. BTC SELL at 90%+ CANNOT trigger the penalize rule. Whitelist is redundant. btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 (+10pts) is the only needed rule.
